context: Tests whether the agent produces the correct package name (@vitronai/alethia) and a correct MCP server configuration using the recommended `npx -y @vitronai/alethia` spawn pattern under mcpServers.alethia. Also checks that the sample test uses correct NLP phrasing and file:// navigation.

checklist.name: Correct npm package name
checklist.description: setup_guide.md and/or mcp_config.json use the exact package name '@vitronai/alethia' (not 'alethia', 'vitronai/alethia', or any other variant)

checklist.name: No manual install step required
checklist.description: setup_guide.md does NOT require a manual `npm install -g @vitronai/alethia` step. The recommended config uses `npx -y`, which auto-installs on first spawn. A global install MAY still be mentioned as an advanced alternative.

checklist.name: mcpServers key in config
checklist.description: mcp_config.json contains a 'mcpServers' key at the top level

checklist.name: alethia server key
checklist.description: mcp_config.json has 'alethia' as the server name under mcpServers

checklist.name: npx -y spawn pattern
checklist.description: mcp_config.json sets command to 'npx' with args including '-y' and '@vitronai/alethia'. This ensures both the bridge and the runtime stay current without manual upgrades. The older 'alethia-mcp' global-install form is acceptable but non-preferred.

checklist.name: Assertion phrasing in sample test
checklist.description: Both assertion steps in sample_test.txt use 'assert X is visible' without a descriptor word prefix (e.g. 'assert Welcome to Orion is visible', not 'assert the heading Welcome to Orion is visible')

checklist.name: Click phrasing in sample test
checklist.description: The click step uses simple 'click Learn More' or 'click the Learn More button' — but NOT a long descriptive form

checklist.name: Auto-install runtime mentioned
checklist.description: setup_guide.md mentions that the headless runtime is auto-installed on first use (no manual runtime install required)

checklist.name: No signup/gate mentioned
checklist.description: setup_guide.md does NOT describe a signup, email gate, or account creation step (Alethia has no signup requirement)
